subject: [PATCH v2 076/110] ceph: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is reiterating their original patch description, which was already provided in the initial message. They are simply copying and pasting the same text as a response to reviewer feedback.
sentiment_signals: author not addressing any specific concern

reviews.author: Viacheslav Linux-f2fs-devel
reviews.summary: Reviewer noted that the patch does not include Reviewed-by tag, which is a formal kernel tag.
reviews.raw_body:
Reviewed-by: Viacheslav Dubeyko <Slava.Dubeyko@ibm.com>

Thanks,
Slava.

_______________________________________________
Linux-f2fs-devel mailing list
Linux-f2fs-devel@lists.sourceforge.net
https://lists.sourceforge.net/lists/listinfo/linux-f2fs-devel

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch replaces the use of PRIino format macro in ceph code with concrete format strings %llu and %llx, which is necessary since i_ino is now a u64 type.
